decisions.title: Replay coverage dedup strategy
decisions.description: Remove ReplayIngestGolden1000 from integration selector because replay gate already enforces replay golden scenarios. This keeps ci-local strict while reducing duplicated execution in integration path.
alternatives: Keep overlap and accept duplicate runtime
Move replay checks to integration only

decisions.title: Checkpoint D1 concluido
decisions.description: Commit 79a1983 executado: INTEGRATION_TEST_PATTERN removeu ReplayIngestGolden1000 (deduplicação com test-replay-golden). Gates pós-commit: test-integration=1s, test-replay-golden=0s, ci-local=15s.
alternatives: Manter replay no gate de integração
Mover replay para integração e remover gate dedicado

decisions.title: Validação W1
decisions.description: Sem relaxamento de gate: test-integration, test-replay-golden e ci-local passaram. Replay continuou coberto pelo gate dedicado; integração removeu sobreposição de selector replay. Timings observados: pre integration=0s vs post integration=1s (sem regressão material), pre replay=1s vs post replay=0s (cached).
alternatives: Reverter mudança e manter cobertura duplicada
